# sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_log_measure_rule (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Monitoring Suite Alert Log Measure Rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_log_measure_rule" "foobar" {
  name = "foobar"
  # or
  # id = "alert-log-measure-rule-uuid-id"
  alert_project_id = "alert-project-resource-id" # e.g. sakura_monitoring_suite_alert_project.foobar.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alert_project_id` (String) The resource ID of the Alert Project.

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Alert Log Measure Rule.
- `name` (String) The name of the Monitoring Suite Alert Log Measure Rule.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the Monitoring Suite Alert Log Measure Rule
- `description` (String) The description of the Monitoring Suite Alert Log Measure Rule.
- `log_storage_id` (String) The resource ID of the Log Storage.
- `metric_storage_id` (String) The resource ID of the Metric Storage.
- `rule` (Attributes) The rule of the Alert Log Measure Rule. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rule))
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp of the Monitoring Suite Alert Log Measure Rule

<a id="nestedatt--rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rule`

Read-Only:

- `query` (Attributes) The query of the rule. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rule--query))
- `version` (String) The version of the rule.

<a id="nestedatt--rule--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rule.query`

Read-Only:

- `matchers` (String) The matchers of the query in JSON format. See https://manual.sakura.ad.jp/api/cloud/portal/?api=monitoring-suite-api#tag/%E3%82%A2%E3%83%A9%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88/operation/alerts_projects_log_measure_rules_create for matcher format.
